Hero.subtitle: A junior full-stack developer who enjoys building things end-to-end — from database design to UI. I work carefully, pick up new tools fast, and collaborate well whether in a team, solo, or alongside AI tools. Currently focusing on Next.js while shipping real features in a production CRM.

data.skills_description: A practical set of tools I use to build and ship web applications — from backend APIs to frontend interfaces.
data.experience_subtitle: Real-world experience in developing web systems, managing databases, and delivering impactful digital solutions.

skills.name: TypeScript & JavaScript
skills.description: Typing architectures, custom generics, decorator patterns, and compiler tuning.

skills.name: Ruby on Rails
skills.description: MVC architecture, ActiveRecord ORM, RESTful routing, and server-side rendering with ERB templates.

skills.name: React & Next.js
skills.description: Server actions, React Server Components (RSC), hydration stream optimizations, and custom hooks.

skills.name: Tailwind CSS & Framer Motion
skills.description: Complex fluid designs, layout-id migrations, physics animations, and custom utility plugins.

skills.name: PostgreSQL
skills.description: Currently learning — exploring advanced queries and index optimization for scalable apps.

skills.name: MySQL
skills.description: Relational database design, data migrations, and API-integrated transaction management.

skills.name: PHP & Laravel
skills.description: RESTful API development, middleware, authentication, role-based access control, and Hostinger deployment.

projects.title: E-Commerce Frontend
projects.description: React-based e-commerce interface integrated with a backend API for a responsive shopping experience.
projects.longDescription: Built a React.js e-commerce frontend featuring product listing, search, cart, and checkout flows. Integrated user authentication and transaction data from a RESTful API backend in real-time.
achievements: Implemented product listing, search, cart, and checkout flows.
Integrated user authentication from RESTful API backend.
Connected real-time transaction data across all frontend views.
Built responsive UI using Tailwind CSS across all screen sizes.

projects.title: Company Profile PT Inspirasi Solusi Kreatif
projects.description: RESTful API for dynamic content management of a company profile website with role-based authentication.
projects.longDescription: Developed a RESTful API using Laravel 12 to support a company profile website with an admin panel. Designed a relational database structure, implemented authentication and role-based access control, and ensured full integration with the frontend team.
achievements: Designed relational database structure for dynamic content modules.
Implemented role-based access control using Laravel middleware.
Built and tested API endpoints for full frontend integration.
Developed admin panel support with structured content management.

projects.title: E-Commerce Backend
projects.description: Full-cycle e-commerce RESTful API covering product management, user auth, and payment integration.
projects.longDescription: Built an e-commerce backend using Laravel with a relational database for products, users, and transactions. Handled data validation, user authentication, order management, and payment integration through API endpoints.
achievements: Designed relational database for products, users, and transactions.
Implemented order management flow from cart to confirmation.
Integrated payment gateway through structured API endpoints.
Handled data validation and error handling across all modules.

projects.title: Student Attendance System
projects.description: Web-based attendance system with multi-role user management and centralized attendance monitoring.
projects.longDescription: Built a school attendance system using Laravel with multi-role authentication (admin, teacher, student). Designed the database schema for attendance records and developed input and monitoring features for real-time attendance tracking.
achievements: Built multi-role authentication for admin, teacher, and student.
Designed database schema for structured attendance records.
Developed real-time attendance input and monitoring features.
Implemented role-based access to restrict data per user type.

projects.title: Admin Dashboard E-Commerce
projects.description: Centralized admin dashboard for managing products, users, and orders with real-time API integration.
projects.longDescription: Developed an admin dashboard using React.js and Tailwind CSS. Integrated backend APIs for real-time CRUD operations on products, user management, and transaction monitoring — all in one centralized system.
achievements: Built centralized CRUD interface for products, users, and orders.
Integrated backend API for real-time data updates across views.
Managed global state and data flow for admin operations.
Designed clean dashboard UI with Tailwind CSS component system.

description: Built and maintained features across a Ruby on Rails CRM system covering leads, quotations, products, and course management modules.
Implemented dynamic admin UI using Hotwire (Turbo + Stimulus) — including auto-slug generation, live duplicate checking with debounce, and multi-select principal assignment.
Developed PDF quotation generation with Prawn supporting two distinct templates (New License and Renewal) with dynamic data mapping.
Migrated hardcoded Rails enums to a Picklist-driven system with cascade-on-rename, delete protection, and admin-only authorization via Pundit.
Extended lead import/export service with bulk principal assignment, server-side access validation, and primary contact column mapping.
Designed relational database structures and wrote scoped queries with eager loading to prevent N+1 issues across multiple modules.
Developed RESTful APIs using Laravel to support a website system with an admin panel.
Designed relational database structures and data flows for dynamic content management.
Implemented authentication and role-based access control using Laravel middleware.
Managed data validation, error handling, API testing, and frontend team integration.
Developed a company profile website using Laravel and MySQL.
Built a backend-driven content management system for admin use.
Designed UI prototypes in Figma as the foundation for frontend implementation.

contact.subtitle: Open to freelance projects, full-time full-stack roles, or just a good conversation about web development. Send me a message and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.field_message_placeholder: Tell me about your project, idea, or opportunity...
contact.success_desc: Thanks for reaching out. I'll read your message and reply to your email as soon as possible.
